name: team_task_remove_context
description: Remove a context source from a task by its index in the context_sources array. Use this to clean up outdated, irrelevant, or incorrect context references. Remaining context entries will be re-indexed after removal.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task whose context to remove

context_index.description: Zero-based index of the context source to remove from the task's context_sources array

examples.name: Remove the first context source from a task
